sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59755" key="kraugasi/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κραυγ-ᾰσίδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, as if a Patron. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κραύγασος</foreign>, <title_ TEIform="title">Croaker</title_>, name of a frog in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:243" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">243</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
